assessment.note: He explicitly doubts whether his current work is the kind that gets recognized, signalling both stalled growth and unclear success criteria.

new_queue.label: Recognized work
new_queue.name: What kind of work do you believe gets recognized here?
new_queue.description: Drills into his recognition concern to surface his model of what advancement-worthy work looks like.

new_queue.label: Support needed
new_queue.name: What would make the next two weeks steadier for you?
new_queue.description: Closes by turning the conversation toward immediate support and practical stabilizers.
